headline: PayPal Stock Rises After Earnings. New CEO Is Off to a Good Start.
summary: Shares of  PayPal  rose Tuesday after the company reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings.  The payments giant reported adjusted earnings of $1.34 a share for the first quarter, up from $1.33 a year ago and ahead of analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.27, per FactSet.  PayPal stock jumped 3.1% in premarket trading.

content.title: PayPal Stock Rises After Earnings. New CEO Is Off to a Good Start.
content.summary: Shares of  PayPal  rose Tuesday after the company reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings.  The payments giant reported adjusted earnings of $1.34 a share for the first quarter, up from $1.33 a year ago and ahead of analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.27, per FactSet.  PayPal stock jumped 3.1% in premarket trading.

headline: PayPal Earnings, Revenue Beat Under New CEO. Company Aims To Cut $1.5 Billion In Costs.
summary: PayPal Holdings on Tuesday reported first-quarter earnings and revenue under a new chief executive that topped Wall Street consensus estimates.  PayPal stock rose as the company announced a $1.5 billion cost reduction program over the next two to three years.  PayPal earnings for Q1 rose 1% to $1.34 per share on an adjusted basis.

content.title: PayPal Earnings, Revenue Beat Under New CEO. Company Aims To Cut $1.5 Billion In Costs.
content.summary: PayPal Holdings on Tuesday reported first-quarter earnings and revenue under a new chief executive that topped Wall Street consensus estimates.  PayPal stock rose as the company announced a $1.5 billion cost reduction program over the next two to three years.  PayPal earnings for Q1 rose 1% to $1.34 per share on an adjusted basis.

headline: PayPal Earnings Beat Estimates. The Stock Is Tumbling Anyway.
summary: PayPal  stock fell sharply Tuesday after the company reported better-than-expected earnings but issued a downbeat outlook for the current quarter.  The payments giant reported adjusted earnings of $1.34 a share for the first quarter, up from $1.33 a year ago and ahead of analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.27, per FactSet.  PayPal reiterated its full-year guidance for a “low-single digit decline to slightly positive” growth in adjusted earnings per share.

content.title: PayPal Earnings Beat Estimates. The Stock Is Tumbling Anyway.
content.summary: PayPal  stock fell sharply Tuesday after the company reported better-than-expected earnings but issued a downbeat outlook for the current quarter.  The payments giant reported adjusted earnings of $1.34 a share for the first quarter, up from $1.33 a year ago and ahead of analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.27, per FactSet.  PayPal reiterated its full-year guidance for a “low-single digit decline to slightly positive” growth in adjusted earnings per share.
